chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2076 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 11233/25 (urgent) 2.For order on office objection a/w reply at flag-A 3.For order on MA No. 11234/25 (exemption) 4.For hearing of bail application 11.08.2025 Mr. S.M. Azad Khan, Advocate a/w Applicant ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 4. Applicant Syed Abdi Hassan Zaidi son of Syed Tehzeeb Hussain Zaidi, is present along with his Counsel to seek protective bail to enable him to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and has been called up by complainant under Section 160 CrPC, in FIA CTW Case No.06/2024 of PS Counter Terrorism Wing, Federal Investigation Agency, Lahore. Counsel contends that applicant apprehends his arrest and humiliation at the hands of police as such he seeks protective bail so as to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such he has appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicant will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Ashraf
